$comment: Layer B selection cases for BONUS vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. PERFORM CALC performs the whole three-block section; a candidate that treats it as the first block only computes the base and never assigns BONUS/TOTAL, caught on every non-zero case. Cases cover the below-limit path, both sides of the 50000.00 uplift boundary, the half-cent base (0.50 -> 0.015 -> 0.02), a deep uplift, and zero.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 BONUS (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-bonus)
